case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. CHINESE HOSPITAL ASSOCIATION, AN UNINCORPORATED et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT CHINESE HOSPITAL ASSOCIATION, AN UNINCORPORATED ASSOCIATION ENGLISH, SAMUEL AN IND.

TOXIC TORT/ENVIRONMENT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT CHINESE HOSPITAL ASSOCIATION, AN UNINCORPORATED ASSOCIATION ENGLISH, SAMUEL AN IND. NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-19-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-16-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-04-2003

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHINESE HOSPITAL ASSOCIATION, AN UNINCORPORATED ASSOCIATION ENGLISH, SAMUEL AN IND. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, $10,000 SHALL BE PAID BY DEFENDANT - SAMUEL ENGLISH ONLY, PLS. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH AND SCANNED DOCUMENT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-19-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
